scripts.build: pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service build
scripts.test: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts test && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service test && pnpm test:time-purity && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service test:timezone && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service smoke:production-entry && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service openapi:lint && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service openapi:check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service test:typecheck
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test:coverage && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service test:coverage
scripts.test:time-purity: pnpm test:time-governance && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test:time-purity && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service test:time-purity
scripts.openapi:validate: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service openapi:lint && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service openapi:check
scripts.schema:validate: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/service exec vitest run tests/openapi-contract.test.ts
